nasa_apod.title: Eye on the Milky Way
nasa_apod.explanation: Have you ever had stars in your eyes? It appears that the eye on the left does, and moreover, it appears to be gazing at even more stars. The featured 27-frame mosaic was taken in 2019 from Ojas de Salar in the Atacama Desert of Chile.  The eye is actually a small lagoon captured reflecting the dark...
